user.title: Connect to Ollama
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Ollama server.

model.title: Select Model
model.description: Choose which Ollama model to use for conversations.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Ollama server. Ensure it is running and accessible.
error.no_models: No models found on the Ollama server. Pull a model first (e.g., `ollama pull llama3.1`).
